testsuite.name: io.slogr.agent.platform.commands.UpgradeHandlerTest

testcase.name: rejects checksum without sha256 prefix (non-sha256 format)()
registered under upgrade key in dispatcher()
rejects URL not on releases slogr io()

testsuite.system-out: 21:13:31.672 [Test worker @coroutine#307] WARN io.slogr.agent.platform.commands.UpgradeHandler -- Upgrade failed: checksum must start with 'sha256:' 21:13:31.690 [Test worker @coroutine#308] WARN io.slogr.agent.platform.commands.UpgradeHandler -- Upgrade failed: checksum must start with 'sha256:' 21:13:31.709 [Test worker @coroutine#309] WARN io.slogr.agent.platform.commands.UpgradeHandler -- Upgrade rejected: URL not on releases.slogr.io — http://evil.com/x 21:13:31.709 [Test worker @coroutine#309] WARN io.slogr.agent.platform.commands.UpgradeHandler -- Upgrade failed: download_url must be on releases.slogr.io 21:13:31.720 [Test worker @coroutine#310] WARN io.slogr.agent.platform.commands.UpgradeHandler -- Upgrade rejected: URL not on releases.slogr.io — http://evil.example.com/malware.jar 21:13:31.720 [Test worker @coroutine#310] WARN io.slogr.agent.platform.commands.UpgradeHandler -- Upgrade failed: download_url must be on releases.slogr.io 21:13:31.732 [Test worker @coroutine#311] WARN io.slogr.agent.platform.commands.UpgradeHandler -- Upgrade failed: missing download_url
